scripts.prepare:site: npm run prepare:assets && npm run prepare:content
scripts.dev: npm run prepare:site && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro dev
scripts.build: npm run prepare:site && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && pagefind --site dist
scripts.preview: npm run prepare:site && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro preview
scripts.check: npm run prepare:site && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check
